nasb.text: I lifted my eyes and looked, and behold, there was a certain man dressed in linen, whose waist was girded with a belt of pure gold of Uphaz.

esv.text: I lifted up my eyes and looked, and behold, a man clothed in linen, with a belt of fine gold from Uphaz around his waist.

cnv.text: 我舉目觀看，看見有一個人身穿細麻衣，腰束烏法純金的帶。

ccb.text: 举目观看，见有一个人身穿细麻衣，腰束纯金的带子，
